title: hieracium racemosum subsp. ageratoides
intro: Hieracium racemosum subsp. ageratoides, also known as hawkweed, is a flowering plant species in the dandelion family (Asteraceae). It is used for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is valued for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing fever and alleviating symptoms of rheumatism and arthritis, as well as promoting digestion and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Hieracium racemosum subsp. ageratoides include teas, infusions, and dried extracts, which are often consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
